footer.description: Your trusted partner for premium custom packaging solutions. We specialize in high-quality grey board laminated boxes, gift packaging, and more.

home.exploreRange: Explore our diverse range of premium custom packaging boxes designed for every industry — gift boxes, cosmetic packaging, jewelry boxes, food packaging and luxury rigid boxes.
home.handpickedSelections: Handpicked selections from our premium collection
home.experienceDescription: As a leading custom packaging manufacturer in China, Shanghai Douyue Industrial Co., Ltd has spent over 15 years helping global brands create premium custom packaging boxes. We combine traditional craftsmanship with modern technology to deliver exceptional quality, low MOQs and reliable worldwide shipping.
home.customDesigns: Custom designs with advanced printing techniques
home.fastTurnaround: Fast turnaround and reliable global shipping
home.freeQuoteDescription: Get a free quote for your custom packaging project. Whether you need luxury gift boxes, cosmetic packaging or rigid boxes, our team is ready to help bring your vision to life.
home.seoSectionTitle: Premium Custom Packaging for Every Industry
home.seoSectionText: DY Packs is a trusted custom packaging manufacturer in China, specializing in premium packaging boxes for cosmetics, jewelry, food, gifts and luxury retail. From rigid gift boxes and magnetic closure boxes to eco-friendly folding cartons, we deliver low-MOQ, factory-direct custom packaging solutions with fast turnaround and global shipping. Browse our collections or contact us for a tailored quote.

contact.faq1Question: What is the minimum order quantity?
contact.faq1Answer: MOQ varies by product type. Standard items start from 100 pcs, while custom designs typically require 500+ pcs. Contact us for specific requirements.
contact.faq2Answer: Standard production takes 7-15 business days. Custom orders may require 15-25 days depending on complexity. Rush orders are available.
contact.faq3Answer: Yes! We ship worldwide via sea freight, air freight, and express courier. We can arrange shipping to your preferred port or address.
contact.faq4Question: Can I get samples before ordering?
contact.faq4Answer: Absolutely. We offer sample services for all our products. Sample costs may apply but are typically refunded with your first order.
contact.faq5Question: What payment methods do you accept?
contact.faq5Answer: We accept PayPal and Alipay for international transactions. Bank transfer (T/T) is also available for larger orders.
contact.getInTouchTeam: Get in touch with our team for inquiries, quotes, or support
contact.loveToHear: We'd love to hear from you. Whether you have a question about our products, pricing, or anything else, our team is ready to answer all your questions.

Monday - Friday: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM (CST)
Saturday: 9:00 AM - 12:00 PM
contact.respond24Hours: We typically respond within 24 hours on business days

about.title: Your Custom Packaging Partner
about.subtitle: DY Packs is a custom packaging manufacturer in China helping brands create premium packaging that stands out — with low MOQs, flexible customization, and sustainable options from our Shanghai facility.
about.whoWeAreP1: DY Packs is a full-service custom packaging manufacturer based in Shanghai, China. For over 15 years, we have helped businesses across cosmetics, jewelry, food, and luxury retail turn packaging into a powerful brand statement.
about.whoWeAreP2: Our in-house facility handles everything from structural design and material selection to sampling, printing, and final production. Whether you need rigid gift boxes, magnetic closure boxes, or eco-friendly food packaging, we manage the entire process under one roof.
about.whoWeAreP3: We believe packaging should do more than protect your product — it should create a memorable unboxing experience, strengthen brand recognition, and help you win customers at first sight.
about.facilityAlt: Our packaging production facility in Shanghai
about.solutionsSubtitle: We understand the common frustrations brands face when sourcing custom packaging overseas. Here is how DY Packs makes it easier.
about.solutionLowMoqDesc: Worried about high minimums? We offer low MOQs starting from 100–500 pieces, making premium custom packaging accessible to startups, small brands, and growing businesses.
about.solutionReliableDesc: Tired of inconsistent quality? Our in-house QC team inspects materials, printing, assembly, and finishing at every stage — so what you approve is what you receive.
about.solutionBrandingTitle: Packaging That Tells Your Brand Story
about.solutionBrandingDesc: Struggling to stand out? We offer custom sizes, shapes, colors, logos, foil stamping, embossing, spot UV, and unique inserts to make your packaging unmistakably yours.
about.solutionEcoDesc: Need eco-friendly solutions? We provide FSC-certified paper, recycled cardboard, kraft materials, soy-based inks, and compostable films for brands that care about the planet.
about.solutionShippingDesc: Concerned about international logistics? We ship to 50+ countries with clear timelines, reliable freight partners, and full export documentation support.
about.solutionServiceDesc: Need clear communication? Our bilingual team works directly with you from quote to delivery, providing samples, photos, and updates throughout production.
about.capabilitiesDesc: From luxury rigid boxes to practical food-grade packaging, we produce a wide range of custom solutions tailored to your product and brand.
about.valuesDescription: The principles that guide every box we make and every relationship we build.
about.qualityFirstDesc: Premium materials, strict QC, and attention to detail in every production run.
about.innovationDesc: Modern printing, finishing, and structural design that keeps your packaging ahead of the curve.
about.customerCentricDesc: Responsive communication, flexible MOQs, and solutions tailored to your brand.
about.sustainabilityDesc: Eco-friendly materials and responsible processes for brands that care about the planet.
about.readyToPartner: Ready to Bring Your Packaging to Life?
about.partnerDescription: Tell us about your project and receive a tailored quote within 24 hours. Whether you need a sample, a small batch, or large-scale production, we are here to help.

carol.welcome:
Hi there! I'm **Carol** from DY Packs. 👋

I'm here to help you with custom packaging solutions. What can I assist you with today?
carol.quoteIntro: Great! I'd be happy to help you get a quote. What type of packaging product are you looking for?
carol.inquiryIntro: Sure! Please tell me what products you're interested in and any specific requirements you have.
carol.browseIntro:
You can browse our full range of premium packaging products on our Products page.

Would you like me to take you there?
carol.askQuantity: Got it! What quantity are you looking for?
carol.askEmail: Perfect! What's the best email address to reach you at?
carol.askDetails: Thank you! Would you like to add any additional requirements or details? (Size, material, design preferences, etc.)
carol.emailBodyStart:
Hi Carol,

I'm interested in getting a quote for custom packaging.
carol.emailBodyEnd:
Please get back to me with pricing and lead time.

Thank you!
carol.thanksDetails: Thanks for providing all the details! I've prepared an inquiry email for you. Click the button below to send it directly to me.
carol.emailClientOpened:
✅ Your email client should have opened with the inquiry draft. If not, you can manually email me at **carolni@dypacks.com**.

I'll get back to you within 24 hours!

hero.customSolutions: Custom packaging solutions crafted with precision and elegance. From luxury gift boxes to specialized industrial packaging — we bring your vision to life.
hero.elevateBeauty: Elevate your beauty line with our premium cosmetic packaging. Magnetic closures, foil stamping, and velvet linings that create an unforgettable unboxing experience.
hero.makeEveryGift: Make every gift memorable with our handcrafted luxury boxes. Perfect for corporate gifts, weddings, and special occasions with fully customizable designs.
hero.ecoConscious: Eco-conscious packaging without compromising on quality. Recycled materials, soy-based inks, and biodegradable options for brands that care about the planet.
hero.experience50Countries: Over 15 years of experience serving clients across 50+ countries. ISO 9001 certified manufacturing with competitive pricing and reliable global logistics.
